title: Automatation with condition "is not" for Person or Group
excerpt:
Please expand the condition “is not” (like in satus or column) to a person and group. 
The workaround with a new status/filter is nice, but not the solution.

posts.author: gerantos (Gerardo Delgado)
posts.cookedHtml:
Please expand the condition “is not” (like in satus or column) to a person and group.
The workaround with a new status/filter is nice, but not the solution.
